The Offering

Two shovel-ready tracts.

Graded and utility-served parcels available now — purchase individually or as one cohesive tract.

Multi-Family$3,750,000

24.76 Acres Freedom Tracts Subdivision

A contiguous graded multi-family site along the creek corridor — the closest proximity to the AFB Main Gate and the surging Liberty Blvd expansion zone.

Light Industrial / Commercial$1,150,000

7.30 Acres Light Industrial

A flat, graded commercial parcel with I-90 visibility on the western edge near Liberty Boulevard — fronting a corridor carrying a combined 34,600+ vehicles per day, positioned to serve the growing residential base.

Investor Flex-Option

Purchase as individual development parcels — or acquire the entire cohesive tract as one strategic assemblage.

The Land-Use Plan

One connected community.

Framed by I-90 and US Hwy 14 to the north, Liberty Boulevard to the west, 151st Avenue to the east, and Highway 1416 to the south — with a natural creek threading the southern parcels.

Location

In the path of growth.

Box Elder sits beside Ellsworth Air Force Base — the selected first home of the Air Force's next-generation B-21 Raider — one of the strongest drivers of housing demand in the region.

With direct access at I-90 Exit 67, proximity to the AFB Main Gate, and a future Douglas High School bordering the site, Freedom Estates is positioned to meet demand across every use — homes, rentals, and commercial.
